adjudications.basis: Reread ts-seat-service/src/main/java/seat/config/SecurityConfig.java:46-58 -- the corsConfigurer bean registers a global CorsRegistry mapping on /** (ALL origins/methods/headers, credentials false, maxAge 3600), a declaration distinct from the per-endpoint @CrossOrigin annotations on SeatController. Kept as its own SecurityConfig-subject atom; pass-b's row-0 (all-origins... global-mapping) folds this bean together with two SeatController lines into one atom and is rejected below as a conflation of two distinct declarations.

Reread ts-seat-service/src/main/java/seat/config/SecurityConfig.java:78 -- .addFilterBefore(new JWTFilter(), UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter.class) confirmed. Pass-b never produced a checksPermission-predicate atom for either SecurityConfig class in this chunk; kept as a pass-a-only observation.

Same fact as pass-b's row 1, which omits the images token from its object text; kept using this pass's more complete object.
